creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Routine bugfix update to version 3.3.8

Annonce message:

  "Welcome to phpMyAdmin 3.3.8, a bugfix release.

   Details will appear on http://phpmyadmin.net. In a hurry? you can visit
   http://sourceforge.net/projects/phpmyadmin to download.

   Marc Delisle, for the team"

ChangeLog:

   http://sourceforge.net/projects/phpmyadmin/files//phpMyAdmin/3.3.8/phpMyAdmin-3.3.8-notes.html/view
